cards.prompt: Query syntax where+select: filter scores > 80, keep source order
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; int[] scores = [97, 92, 81, 60]; var q = from s in scores where s > 80 select s; Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", q));

cards.prompt: Query syntax where+orderby+select equals the Where().OrderBy().Select() chain
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; int[] n = [5,3,8,1,9,2]; var q = from x in n where x > 3 orderby x select x*10; Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", q));

cards.prompt: Count has no query clause; called as a method on the query part
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; var n = Enumerable.Range(1, 20); var q = from x in n where x % 2 == 0 select x; Console.WriteLine(q.Count());
